question: q01
question_title: 生态系统服务估值模型
statement: Create an ecological services valuation model to understand true economic costs of land use projects.
methods: 使用官方题面列举的 water filtration、pollination/food support、carbon/oxygen cycling、waste assimilation、biodiversity/habitat services，构建 30 年贴现服务价值表。对应模型：生态系统服务估值、贴现现金流。

data_source.source_pdf: /Users/wuxiaojun/code/Math-Modeling-World/docs/mcm-2015-2025/official_assets/2019/What is the Cost of Environmental Degradation-

land_use_projects.project: small community road and sewer extension

parameters.source_note: Official PDF statement categories only; monetary values, sensitivities, and project rows are explicit deterministic modeling inputs for audit and replacement.

service_rows.accounting_role: include as avoided loss, mitigation target, or restoration liability in project cost-benefit analysis
include as avoided loss, mitigation target, or restoration liability in project cost-benefit analysis
include as avoided loss, mitigation target, or restoration liability in project cost-benefit analysis
include as avoided loss, mitigation target, or restoration liability in project cost-benefit analysis
include as avoided loss, mitigation target, or restoration liability in project cost-benefit analysis

valuation_model.valuation_rule: environmental cost equals area disturbed times discounted service value times degradation sensitivity after mitigation

assumption_audit.truthfulness_note: This workflow uses official statement parameters and transparent deterministic valuation scenarios; it does not use random placeholder data.
model_limits: COMAP did not provide a land-cover table, project cost ledger, or local ecosystem measurements.
Dollar values are transparent planning inputs inspired by the service categories named in the statement, not observed project accounts.
A full paper should replace them with local data.gov ecosystem data, satellite land cover, restoration bids, and monitoring records.
